notes: Successfully teleported to Mudwich village (188,157) using /teleport command. Player is now in the overworld with grass, trees, buildings, NPCs, and monsters. WASD movement confirmed working. Key discoveries: (1) Tutorial-gated doors block exit without completing tutorial, (2) SKIP_DATABASE=true makes all players admin with /teleport access, (3) Playwright MCP screenshots with relative paths navigate away from game page - must use absolute paths, (4) WASD uses hold-to-move not tap-to-move.

discoveries.screenshot_bug: browser_take_screenshot with relative paths navigates away from game - use absolute paths or browser_run_code
discoveries.wasd_mechanics: WASD sets moveDown=true on keydown, false on keyup - must hold key, not tap
discoveries.tutorial_gate: Dungeon exit doors require tutorial quest completion, bypassed via /teleport admin command
discoveries.admin_access: SKIP_DATABASE=true grants admin to all players, enabling /teleport commands
